messages.选择界面显示语言。: Choose the language used throughout the interface.
messages.界面字体与代码/终端等宽字体分开设置；代码与终端共用同一字体族，字号可独立调整。: Set interface and monospace fonts separately; the editor and terminal share one font family while their sizes remain independent.
messages.界面与代码/终端字体均支持系统默认；代码与终端共用同一等宽字体族，字号可独立调整: The interface, editor, and terminal all support the system default; the editor and terminal share one monospace font family while their sizes remain independent.
messages.配置默认启动方式与终端配置文件。: Configure the default startup behavior and terminal profiles.
messages.（操作系统切换明暗时自动跟随）: (updates automatically when the system appearance changes)
messages.用于菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏。: Used for menus, sidebars, tabs, and the status bar.
messages.用于菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏，支持选择系统默认字体。: Used for menus, sidebars, tabs, and the status bar. Supports the system default font.
messages.代码编辑器与终端共用同一等宽字体族。: The editor and terminal use the same monospace font family.
messages.代码编辑器与终端共用同一等宽字体族，支持选择系统默认字体。: The editor and terminal use the same monospace font family. Supports the system default font.
messages.仅影响编辑器中的代码。: Only affects code in the editor.
messages.当前为浏览器预览模式，项目、文件、终端等功能不可用。请使用: This is a browser preview. Projects, files, and terminals are unavailable. Run
messages.启动，并在弹出的桌面窗口中操作。: and use the desktop window that opens.
messages.当前项目「{name}」暂无终端，点击标签栏 + 新建: The current project, “{name}”, has no terminal. Use + in the tab bar to create one.
messages.请先选择或添加项目，终端将默认基于当前项目创建: Select or add a project first. New terminals start in the current project.
messages.无法确定该路径所属项目: Could not determine which project owns this path
messages.无法确定该目录所属项目: Could not determine which project owns this folder
messages.文件夹内的全部内容都会被删除，且无法撤销。: All contents in this folder will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
messages.在文件管理器中打开失败: {error}: Could not open in File Explorer: {error}
messages.目录不可用，请重新定位: Folder unavailable. Please relocate the project.
messages.请先选择或添加项目: Select or add a project first
messages.将终止当前项目的 {count} 个运行中终端: This will terminate {count} running terminal(s) in the current project
messages.关闭后将终止当前 shell 进程，会话中的未保存输出会丢失。: Closing will terminate the current shell process and discard unsaved output.
messages.关闭后将终止对应 shell 进程，会话中的未保存输出会丢失。: Closing will terminate the relevant shell processes and discard unsaved output.
messages.请先选择或添加项目，再创建终端: Select or add a project before creating a terminal
messages.已达到每个项目 {count} 个终端的上限: Maximum of {count} terminals per project reached
messages.左键：默认配置；右键：选择终端配置: Left click: default profile; right click: choose a profile
messages.清除目录限定，回到当前项目根: Clear folder limit and return to the current project root
messages.输入后缀/扩展名，如 .ts 或 ts: Enter a suffix or extension, e.g. .ts or ts
messages.输入关键词、通配符（*）或选择文件类型开始搜索: Enter keywords, wildcards (*), or pick a file type to search
messages.输入关键词搜索文件内容: Enter keywords to search file contents
messages.输入关键词、通配符（*）或选择常见类型开始搜索: Enter keywords, a wildcard (*), or choose a common type to start searching
messages.从常见模板填充（Python 后端 + 前端）: Fill from a common template (Python backend + frontend)
messages.点击“添加任务”或“模板”快速开始: Click “Add Task” or “Template” to get started
messages.Windows 下使用 CMD，可用 && 连接命令；换行会自动转为 &&。工作: Uses CMD on Windows. Join commands with &&; line breaks are converted to &&. No need to add cd when a working directory is set.
messages.留空=项目根；可相对，如 backend/: Leave empty for project root; relative paths such as backend/ are allowed
messages.Ctrl + Shift + C：复制完整文件路径；Alt + C：复制 @项目: Ctrl + Shift + C: copy full file path; Alt + C: copy @project/relative-path#Lline reference
messages.在文件管理器中显示失败: {error}: Could not reveal in File Explorer: {error}
messages.可不选；未指定时使用内置普通 PowerShell 终端。: Optional. Uses the built-in PowerShell terminal when no profile is selected.
messages.点击 + 使用默认配置；右键 + 可选择其它配置。启动命令留空时启动 Power: Click + for the default profile; right-click + to choose another profile. An empty startup command starts PowerShell. Programs such as opencode can rename the tab from the window title, or you can double-click a tab to rename it manually.
messages.将移除工作区记录并关闭相关终端与标签页，不会删除磁盘上的项目文件。: This removes workspace records and closes related terminals and tabs. Files on disk are not deleted.
messages.暂无项目。点击上方按钮添加。: No projects yet. Use the buttons above to add one.
messages.全选当前列表: Select all in the current list
messages.顶栏 ✕ 仅隐藏显示；此处「永久删除」才会清除项目记录: The ✕ in the title bar only hides a project; only “Delete Permanently” here removes its record.
messages.{action}会丢失这些更改，且无法撤销。: {action} will discard these changes and cannot be undone.
messages.确定要关闭应用程序吗？: Are you sure you want to close the application?
messages.{count} 个终端仍在运行，退出后将终止。: {count} terminal(s) are still running and will be terminated when you quit.
messages.该项目有 {count} 个运行中的终端，移除后将被终止。\n不会删除磁盘上的项:
This project has {count} running terminal(s), which will be terminated when it is removed.
Files on disk will not be deleted.
messages.不会删除磁盘上的项目文件。: Files on disk will not be deleted.
messages.工作区设置作用于当前项目「{name}」。多数界面设置仅用户作用域可用；工作区主: Workspace settings apply to the current project “{name}”. Most UI settings are user-scoped; workspace is mainly for project-settings.json.
messages.此设置仅在用户作用域中可用: This setting can only be applied in the User scope
messages.指定 QingCode 使用的颜色主题。选择“跟随系统”时随操作系统明暗切换。: Specifies the QingCode color theme. Choose “Auto” to follow the OS light/dark mode.
messages.控制菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏的字号（像素）。: Controls the font size in pixels for menus, side bars, tabs, and the status bar.
messages.控制编辑器中的字号（像素）。: Controls the font size in pixels in the editor.
messages.用于菜单、侧栏、标签和状态栏的字体族。: Font family used for menus, side bars, tabs, and the status bar.
messages.控制编辑器字体族。终端默认共用同一等宽字体。: Controls the font family for the editor. The terminal shares the same monospace font by default.
messages.控制终端的字号（像素）。: Controls the font size in pixels of the terminal.
messages.新建终端时使用的默认配置。未指定时使用内置普通 PowerShell 终端。: Default profile used when creating a terminal. Uses the built-in PowerShell terminal when unset.
messages.终端配置文件可在下方管理（名称与启动命令）。: Manage terminal profiles below (name and startup command).
messages.选择界面显示语言。更改后立即生效。: Choose the UI display language. Changes apply immediately.
messages.在编辑器中打开全局 default-settings.json（JSON5，可写: Open global default-settings.json in the editor (JSON5 with comments). Use qingcode.projects for the project list; sync on startup when qingcode.projects.syncOnStartup is true.
Open the current project’s .qingcode/project-settings.json in the editor (JSON5 with comments).
messages.支持全局与项目两级 JSON 配置（参考 VS Code）：全局对所有项目生效，: Supports global and project JSON settings (like VS Code): global applies to all projects; project settings override matching global keys.
messages.全局设置对所有项目生效，类似 VS Code 的用户设置（User Settin: Global settings apply to every project, like VS Code User Settings. Use the button below to open the JSON document in the main editor.
messages.已在编辑器中打开设置文件: Opened settings file in the editor
messages.已写入默认模板并在编辑器中打开: Wrote the default template and opened it in the editor
messages.当前环境无法打开设置文件: Cannot open settings files in this environment
messages.编辑后使用 Ctrl+S 保存。项目设置文件位于项目目录，可随仓库提交；全局设置: Save with Ctrl+S after editing. Project settings live in the project folder and can be committed; global settings are stored in the local app data directory.
messages.将项目专属配置保存在 .qingcode/project-settings.js: Store project-specific configuration in .qingcode/project-settings.json for future features.
messages.全局设置对所有项目生效，类似 VS Code 的用户设置（User Settin: Global settings apply to every project, like VS Code User Settings.
messages.项目设置仅作用于当前项目，并覆盖同名全局项，类似 VS Code 的工作区设置（: Project settings apply only to the current project and override matching global keys, like VS Code Workspace Settings.
messages.未选择项目时只能编辑全局设置；选择项目后可切换到「项目」作用域。: Without a selected project you can only edit global settings; select a project to switch to the Project scope.
messages.请先选择项目，再配置项目设置。: Select a project before configuring project settings.
messages.当前环境无法写入设置文件: Cannot write settings files in this environment
messages.设置必须是 JSON 对象: Settings must be a JSON object
messages.custom 必须是 JSON 对象: custom must be a JSON object
messages.项目设置必须是 JSON 对象: Project settings must be a JSON object
messages.项目设置必须包含 custom 对象: Project settings must include a custom object
messages.请先选择项目，再配置项目自定义设置。: Select a project before configuring project custom settings.
messages.当前项目「{name}」的配置文件：: Configuration file for the current project “{name}”:
messages.设置常用操作的按键组合。: Set key combinations for common actions.
messages.打开搜索面板，默认在当前项目中搜索文件与内容。: Open the search panel, scoped to the current project by default.
messages.显示或隐藏终端面板。: Show or hide the terminal panel.
messages.点击输入框后按新的组合键。: Click a field, then press a new key combination.
messages.请输入 Ctrl、Alt、Shift 或 Meta 加按键的组合。: Use Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or Meta with another key.
messages.该按键组合已由编辑器或开发工具使用。: This key combination is already used by the editor or developer tools.
messages.该快捷键已用于「{name}」。: This shortcut is already assigned to “{name}”.
messages.从侧边栏打开文件开始编辑: Open a file from the sidebar to start editing
